teas.title: Divine Bloom™ Signature Tea
teas.ingredients: Lemon balm, peppermint, rose petals, jasmine flowers
teas.description: Our signature botanical blend created to inspire moments of peace, balance, and intentional self-care. Delicately floral with refreshing mint and soothing botanicals, crafted to help you slow down, reconnect with yourself, and make every cup a mindful ritual.

teas.title: Women's Wellness Tea
teas.ingredients: Raspberry leaf, nettle leaf, calendula, peppermint, rose petals
teas.description: A thoughtfully crafted loose-leaf herbal blend designed to become part of your daily wellness ritual. This refreshing blend combines botanical ingredients with a smooth, floral finish to encourage moments of self-care and intentional living.

teas.title: Sleep & Serenity Tea
teas.description: A calming evening herbal blend created for peaceful nighttime rituals. With soft floral notes and refreshing mint, this tea is perfect for winding down and creating moments of tranquility before bed.
